risks.title: Data Security Breach
risks.mitigation: Implement robust encryption, secure authentication, and access controls

risks.title: User Adoption Issues
risks.mitigation: Conduct thorough user testing, provide training and support, and gather feedback for continuous improvement

risks.title: Technical Debt and Maintenance
risks.mitigation: Regularly review and refactor code, allocate resources for maintenance and updates, and prioritize bug fixes

risks.title: Notification System Failure
risks.mitigation: Implement a reliable notification system with redundancy and failover mechanisms

risks.title: PDF Export Compatibility Issues
risks.mitigation: Test PDF export functionality across various devices and browsers to ensure compatibility

risks.title: Role-Based Access Control Misconfiguration
risks.mitigation: Carefully configure and test role-based access controls to ensure correct permissions and access
